revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24755395338|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:伊川谷惣社]] {{Expand Japanese|伊川谷惣社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Ikawadani Sōja | native_name = 伊川谷惣社 | image = 伊川谷惣社.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Ikawadani Sōja | coordinates = {{coord|34.677229|135.020348}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|lt=Ōkuninushi|ca|Ōkuninushi|en|Ōkuninushi|es|Ōkuninushi|fa|اوکونینوشی|fr|Ōkuninushi|hu|Ókuninusi|id|Ookuninushi|it|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主|ko|오오쿠니누시|mni|ꯑꯣꯀꯨꯅꯤꯅꯨꯁꯤ|pl|Ōkuninushi|pt|Ookuninushi|ru|Окунинуси|simple|Ōkuninushi|sr|Okuninuši|sv|Ōkuninushi|tr|Ōkuninushi|uk|Окунінуші|vi|Ōkuninushi|zh|大國主|qid=Q276944|1=Ōkuninushi}} }} {{nihongo|'''Ikawadani Sōja'''|伊川谷惣社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Harima Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * Province|ja|播磨国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11498723|1=List of Shikinaisha in Harima Province}} ** Series ordinal: 2 ** P155: {{ill|Q135041146|ltq=Q135041146|qid=Q135041146|1=Kasuga Shrine (Q135041146)}} ** P156: {{ill|Q11559098|ltq=Q11559098|qid=Q11559098|1=Watatsumi Shrine (Kobe)}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * prepektura)|ce|Кобе|ckb|کۆبێ|cs|Kóbe|cy|Kobe|da|Kobe|de|Kōbe|devoyage|Kōbe|el|Κόμπε|en|Kobe|envoyage|Kobe|eo|Kobeo|es|Kōbe|esvoyage|Kōbe|et|Kōbe|eu|Kobe|ext|Kobe|fa|کوبه (شهر)|favoyage|کوبه|fi|Kōbe|fivoyage|Kobe|fj|Kobe|fo|Kobe|frr|Kōbe|fr|Kobe|frvoyage|Kobe|ga|Kōbe|gd|Kobe|gl|Kōbe|ha|Kobe|he|קובה (יפן)|hevoyage|קובה (יפן)|hi|कोबे|hr|Kobe|hu|Kóbe|hy|Կոբե|id|Kota Kobe|idvoyage|Kobe|io|Kobe|is|Kobe|it|Kōbe|itvoyage|Kōbe|ja|神戸市|javoyage|神戸市|kab|Kobe|ka|კობე|ki|Kobe|ko|고베시|ky|Кобе|lg|Kobe japan|li|Kobe|lmo|Kōbe|lt|Kobė|lv|Kobe|mg|Kobe|mi|Kobe|ml|കോബെ|mn|Кобэ|mr|कोबे|ms|Kobe|mt|Kōbe|my|ကိုးဘေးမြို့|mzn|کوبه|nl|Kobe|nn|Kobe|no|Kobe|oc|Kobe|os|Кобе|pa|ਕੋਬੇ|pl|Kobe|plvoyage|Kobe|pms|Kobe|pnb|کوبے|pnt|Κόμπε|pt|Kobe|ptvoyage|Kobe|qu|Kōbe|ro|Kobe|rovoyage|Kobe|ru|Кобе|runews|Категория:Кобе|sco|Kobe|sc|Kōbe|sh|Kobe|simple|Kobe, Hyōgo|sk|Kóbe|sl|Kobe|sr|Кобе|su|Kobe|sv|Kobe|svvoyage|Kobe|sw|Kobe, Hyogo|szl|Kobe|ta|கோபே|tg|Кобе|th|โคเบะ|tl|Kobe|tr|Kobe|tt|Кобе|tum|Kobe|tw|Kobe|ug|Kobe|uk|Кобе|ur|کوبے|uz|Kobe|vep|Kobe (lidn)|vi|Kōbe|vivoyage|Kobe|war|Kobe|wuu|神户市|zea|Kobe|zh_classical|神戶市|zh_min_nan|Kôbe-chhī|zh_yue|神戶|zh|神户市|zhvoyage|神戶|qid=Q48320|1=Kobe}} * {{ill|Q1047523|ltq=Q1047523|qid=Q1047523|1=Harima Province}} * {{ill|Akashi District, Hyōgo|lt=Akashi district|en|Akashi District, Hyōgo|ja|明石郡|zh|明石郡|qid=Q11512561|1=Akashi District, Hyōgo}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.677229|135.020348}} == image (P18) == * 伊川谷惣社.jpg == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Ōkuninushi|lt=Ōkuninushi|ca|Ōkuninushi|en|Ōkuninushi|es|Ōkuninushi|fa|اوکونینوشی|fr|Ōkuninushi|hu|Ókuninusi|id|Ookuninushi|it|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主|ko|오오쿠니누시|mni|ꯑꯣꯀꯨꯅꯤꯅꯨꯁꯤ|pl|Ōkuninushi|pt|Ookuninushi|ru|Окунинуси|simple|Ōkuninushi|sr|Okuninuši|sv|Ōkuninushi|tr|Ōkuninushi|uk|Окунінуші|vi|Ōkuninushi|zh|大國主|qid=Q276944|1=Ōkuninushi}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 183008 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q134917316|ltq=Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Shinto Directive|lt=Shinto Directive|en|Shinto Directive|fa|بخشنامه شینتو|fr|Directive shinto|id|Pengarahan Shinto|ja|神道指令|zh|神道指令|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * いかわだにそうじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 1140005001029 == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Q135041147|ltq=Q135041147|qid=Q135041147|1=Mononoheno Shrine (Q135041147)}} ** P2868: {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '兵庫県神戸市西区伊川谷町上脇字鬼神山1005', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '兵庫県神戸市西区押部谷町細田132', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:伊川谷惣社]] {{wikidata link|Q11379343}} == Japanese content == {{Shrine | Name=Ikawadani Sōsha | Image=[[File:Ikawadani Sōsha.jpg|250px|Ikawadani Sōsha]]
Worship hall | Location={{ill|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|Q130290|qid=Q130290|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kobe City|Q48320|qid=Q48320|1=Kobe}}{{ill|lt=Nishi Ward (Kobe City)|Q1154552|qid=Q1154552|lt=Nishi Ward|1=Nishi-ku, Kobe}} Ikawadani-chō Kamiwaki, Azonokamiyama 1005 | Coordinates={{WikiCoordinates2-tier degrees minutes seconds|34|40|38.5|N|135|1|13.2|E|region:JP|display=inline,title}} | Enshrined deities={{ill|lt=Ōkuninushi|Q276944|qid=Q276944|lt=Ōnamuchi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōkuninushi}}
{{ill|lt=Susanoo|Q272993|qid=Q272993|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}}
{{ill|qid=Q1107286|lt=Futsunushi|Q1107286|qid=Q1107286|qid=Q1107286|lt=Futsunushi-no-Mikoto|1=Futsunushi}}
{{ill|qid=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi|Q1502690|qid=Q1502690|qid=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Mikoto|1=Takemikazuchi}} | Shrine rank={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} candidate shrine, former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} | Main hall= | Founded=Traditionally during the reign of {{ill|lt=Empress Jingū|Q232803|qid=Q232803|1=Empress Jingū}} | Annual festival=Autumn festival
(Eve festival on the first Saturday of October, main festival on the following Sunday) | Rituals= | Map= {{Location map|Kobe|label=Ikawadani Sōsha|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Ikawadani Sōsha''' (いかわだにそうしゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Ikawadani-chō Kamiwaki, Nishi Ward, Kobe City, Hyōgo Prefecture. It is considered one of the shrines identified with the Mononobe Shrine listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}. Its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|qid=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. It is also called '''Sōsha Shrine'''. === History === According to shrine tradition, on her return from the {{ill|lt=Conquest of the Three Kingdoms of Korea|Q11249435|qid=Q11249435|1=Three Han Campaign}}, {{ill|lt=Empress Jingū|Q232803|qid=Q232803|1=Empress Jingū}} stopped at this place and enshrined {{ill|lt=Ōkuninushi|Q276944|qid=Q276944|lt=Ōnamuchi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōkuninushi}}, which is said to mark the founding of the shrine. This account resembles the descriptions in the {{ill|lt=Nihon Shoki|Q813935|qid=Q813935|1=Nihon Shoki}} regarding the founding of {{ill|lt=Hirota Shrine|Q1466105|qid=Q1466105|1=Hirota Shrine (Osaka City)}}, {{ill|lt=Ikuta Shrine|Q710086|qid=Q710086|1=Ikuta Shrine}}, {{ill|lt=Nagata Shrine|Q661395|qid=Q661395|1=Nagata Shrine}}, and {{ill|lt=Sumiyoshi Taisha|Q705949|qid=Q705949|1=Sumiyoshi-taisha}}, but there is no mention of this shrine in the Nihon Shoki. It is said that after a period of decline, the shrine was rebuilt in the 3rd year of {{ill|lt=Enkyū|Q1193638|qid=Q1193638|1=Enkyū}} ({{ill|lt=1071|Q19432|qid=Q19432|1=1071}}). Perhaps because it was deeply revered by the local community, the area around the shrine has come to be called “Kijinyama” (Demon God Mountain). === Annual Festival === Every year, the autumn festival is held on the first Saturday and Sunday of October. During the autumn festival, {{ill|lt=futon-daiko|Q11277203|qid=Q11277203|1=Futon Daiko}} and {{ill|lt=lion dances|Q713866|qid=Q713866|1=Lion dance}} are dedicated. Autumn Festival.JPG|Futon-daiko of the autumn festival === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.hyogo-jinjacho.com/data/6301252.html Sōsha - Hyōgo Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines] {{Shinto horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ikawadani Sōja]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ikawadani Sōja]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Harima Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Kobe]] [[Category:神戸市西区の建築物]] [[Category:神戸市西区の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Harima Province]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Hyōgo Prefecture]] [[Category:伊川谷町]]
